positive: A mesmerizing, highly detailed celestial map combined with bioluminescent jungle flora. The scene features elegant, stylized silhouettes of rare nocturnal animals (like a deer, fox, and owl) subtly integrated into intricate constellations and flowing nebulae. Use a deep sapphire blue and emerald green palette accented by glowing gold and cyan highlights. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, designed for seamless circular or square printing. The style should be Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with cosmic fantasy illustration, rendered with crisp line work, ultra-high contrast, and deep depth of field. Perfect for apparel print, emphasizing clean edges and distinct separation between foreground and background elements. High detail, vector art quality.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, poor anatomy, bad hands, extra limbs, noise, jpeg artifacts, grainy, messy, cluttered, photo, realistic, cartoon, sketch
